# Copyright Amazon.com: # Custom DCGM counters file. Bind-mounted into the dcgm-exporter
# Inherits everything dcgm-exporter enables by default and adds:
#   - Power / thermal / sync / board / reliability / low-util violations
#   - NVLink replay error counter (other NVLink errors are already on)
#   - Profiling: SM activity / occupancy and per-pipe (FP64/32/16) activity
# Profiling metrics (DCGM_FI_PROF_*) require Volta+ GPUs (p3/g4dn and
# later — all current AWS GPU instances qualify).

column3: help_message
